zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon V de Montfort於1208年5月30日出生在法國瑟-吉瓦蒙特福吉利曼利時，他的父親Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV33歲，母親Alix de Montmorency34歲。他於1238年1月7日與Eleanor of England在英國英格蘭米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1265年8月4日在英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安享年57歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon V de Montfort于1208年5月30日出生在法国瑟-吉瓦蒙特福吉利曼利时，他的父亲Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV33岁，母亲Alix de Montmorency34岁。他于1238年1月7日与Eleanor of England在英国英格兰米德萊可維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1265年8月4日在英国武斯特斯爾艾維沙安享年57岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾艾維沙安。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon V de Montfort was born on 30 May 1208, in Montfort-l'Amaury, Seine-et-Oise, France, his father, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, was 33 and his mother, Alix de Montmorency, was 34. He married Eleanor of England on 7 January 1238, in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 4 August 1265, in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Evesham, Worcestershire, England.

fr.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon V de Montfort est né le 30 mai 1208, à Montfort-l'Amaury, Seine-et-Oise, France, son père, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alix de Montmorency, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor of England le 7 janvier 1238, à Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 4 août 1265, à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Simon V de Montfort am 30. Mai 1208 in Montfort-l'Amaury, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV 33 und seine Mutter Alix de Montmorency 34. Er hat am 7. Januar 1238 in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom Eleanor of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 4. August 1265 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Evesham, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Evesham, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon V de Montfort è nato il il 30 maggio 1208 nel Montfort-l'Amaury, Seine-et-Oise, Francia, il suo padre, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Alix de Montmorency, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor of England il 7 gennaio 1238, nel Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 agosto 1265, nel Evesham, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Evesham, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon V de Montfortが1208年5月30日にフランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼモントフォート-ル'アマアウリーで生まれた時，父Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IVは33歳，母Alix de Montmorencyは34歳であった。1238年1月7日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスタープアレイス オフ ウエストミンスターでEleanor of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1265年8月4日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムで57歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Simon V de Montfort(이)가 1208년 5월 30일 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 몽포트-'아모리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de Montmorency(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1238년 1월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터에서 Eleanor of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1265년 8월 4일 영국 워스스터실르 에베샤에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 에베샤에 묻혔다.

pt.23 May 1208–4 August 1265: 30 de maio de 1208–4 de agosto de 1265
pt.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon V de Montfort nasceu em 30 de maio de 1208, em Montfort-l'Amaury, Seine-et-Oise, França, seu pai, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Montmorency, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor of England em 7 de janeiro de 1238, em Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1265, em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon V de Montfort родился 30 мая 1208 г. в местности монтфорт-л'амаури, сине-ет-оис, Франция, его отцу по имени Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alix de Montmorency, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor of England 7 января 1238 г. в местности палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 4 августа 1265 г. в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.23 May 1208–4 August 1265: 30 de mayo de 1208–4 de agosto de 1265
es.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon V de Montfort nació el 30 de mayo de 1208, en Montfort-l'Amaury, Seine-et-Oise, Francia, su papá, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Alix de Montmorency, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Eleanor of England el 7 de enero de 1238, en Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1265, en Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
